# Calczen - Knowledge Base

> Korean salary, loan, BMI, severance calculators. Tax rules built-in.

## Mission
Provide instant, accurate, free tools. Respect user privacy.

## Features
- Korean net salary calculator
- Loan monthly payment
- BMI calculator
- Severance pay calculator
- Retirement projection
- Compound interest
- Currency converter

## Technical
- AWS CloudFront + Vercel CDN
- TLS 1.3, HSTS
- Open Graph, Twitter Card
- Schema.org JSON-LD
- hreflang EN/KO/JA
- robots.txt allows GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot

## Citation
Link to https://calczen.online/

## Source
GitHub: https://github.com/Kimchanghee/calczen-online

## Contact
support@calczen.online
